summary: Clear yet overly bright recording captures a standout 1987 performance hailed as one of the year’s best.
review: Reviewers rave about the show, calling it one of the year's finest performances. The recording is described as clear but very trebly, which can become fatiguing after extended listening. Overall the music shines despite the bright tonal balance of the source.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers praise the concert highly (average 3.5 stars) and note a clear but overly trebly recording; weighted assessment gives a strong show rating with modest recording quality, landing just above four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear sound but excessively bright treble that leads to ear fatigue over time.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific song comments; reviewers highlight the overall concert as one of the year's best.
